revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
1 revision imported: importing programmatically created pages

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === ==== Sovereign nationalities ==== {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:American people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=United States |Nationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Irish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Ireland |Nationality=Irish }} ==== Non-sovereign nationalities ==== For colonies, protectorates, constituent countries, overseas territories etc: {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish |ParentCountry=Bar | ParentNationality=Barish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:Marshallese people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country =Marshall Islands |Nationality=Marshallese |ParentCountry=United States |ParentNationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Scottish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Scotland |Nationality=Scottish |ParentCountry=United Kingdom | ParentNationality=British}} === See also === *[[Template:Nationality by occupation 2]] for category names using "People from" format *[[Template:Occupation by nationality]] *[[Template:Fooian people]] *[[Template:Fooian women]] / [[Template:Fooian men]] *[[Template:Fooian women by occupation]] / [[Template:Fooian men by occupation]] *[[Template:Fooian fooers]] *[[Template:Fooian scientist types]] *[[Template:Fooian biologist types]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia classification templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === ==== Sovereign nationalities ==== {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:American people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=United States |Nationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Irish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Ireland |Nationality=Irish }} ==== Non-sovereign nationalities ==== For colonies, protectorates, constituent countries, overseas territories etc: {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish |ParentCountry=Bar | ParentNationality=Barish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:Marshallese people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country =Marshall Islands |Nationality=Marshallese |ParentCountry=United States |ParentNationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Scottish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Scotland |Nationality=Scottish |ParentCountry=United Kingdom | ParentNationality=British}} === See also === *[[Template:Nationality by occupation 2]] for category names using "People from" format *[[Template:Occupation by nationality]] *[[Template:Fooian people]] *[[Template:Fooian women]] / [[Template:Fooian men]] *[[Template:Fooian women by occupation]] / [[Template:Fooian men by occupation]] *[[Template:Fooian fooers]] *[[Template:Fooian scientist types]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian biologist types|Template:Fooian biologist types]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia classification templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === ==== Sovereign nationalities ==== {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:American people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=United States |Nationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Irish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Ireland |Nationality=Irish }} ==== Non-sovereign nationalities ==== For colonies, protectorates, constituent countries, overseas territories etc: {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish |ParentCountry=Bar | ParentNationality=Barish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:Marshallese people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country =Marshall Islands |Nationality=Marshallese |ParentCountry=United States |ParentNationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Scottish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Scotland |Nationality=Scottish |ParentCountry=United Kingdom | ParentNationality=British}} === See also === *[[Template:Nationality by occupation 2]] for category names using "People from" format *[[Template:Occupation by nationality]] *[[Template:Fooian people]] *[[Template:Fooian women]] / [[Template:Fooian men]] *[[Template:Fooian women by occupation]] / [[Template:Fooian men by occupation]] *[[Template:Fooian fooers]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian scientist types|Template:Fooian scientist types]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian biologist types|Template:Fooian biologist types]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia classification templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === ==== Sovereign nationalities ==== {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:American people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=United States |Nationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Irish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Ireland |Nationality=Irish }} ==== Non-sovereign nationalities ==== For colonies, protectorates, constituent countries, overseas territories etc: {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish |ParentCountry=Bar | ParentNationality=Barish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:Marshallese people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country =Marshall Islands |Nationality=Marshallese |ParentCountry=United States |ParentNationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Scottish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Scotland |Nationality=Scottish |ParentCountry=United Kingdom | ParentNationality=British}} === See also === *[[Template:Nationality by occupation 2]] for category names using "People from" format *[[Template:Occupation by nationality]] *[[Template:Fooian people]] *[[Template:Fooian women]] / [[Template:Fooian men]] *[[Template:Fooian women by occupation]] / [[Template:Fooian men by occupation]] *[[Template:Fooian fooers]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian scientist types|Template:Fooian scientist types]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian biologist types|Template:Fooian biologist types]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia classification templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === ==== Sovereign nationalities ==== {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:American people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=United States |Nationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Irish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Ireland |Nationality=Irish }} ==== Non-sovereign nationalities ==== For colonies, protectorates, constituent countries, overseas territories etc: {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish |ParentCountry=Bar | ParentNationality=Barish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:Marshallese people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country =Marshall Islands |Nationality=Marshallese |ParentCountry=United States |ParentNationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Scottish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Scotland |Nationality=Scottish |ParentCountry=United Kingdom | ParentNationality=British}} === See also === *[[Template:Nationality by occupation 2]] for category names using "People from" format *[[Template:Occupation by nationality]] *[[Template:Fooian people]] *[[Template:Fooian women]] / [[Template:Fooian men]] *[[Template:Fooian women by occupation]] / [[Template:Fooian men by occupation]] *[[Template:Fooian fooers]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian scientist types|Template:Fooian scientist types]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian biologist types|Template:Fooian biologist types]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia classification templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === ==== Sovereign nationalities ==== {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:American people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=United States |Nationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Irish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Ireland |Nationality=Irish }} ==== Non-sovereign nationalities ==== For colonies, protectorates, constituent countries, overseas territories etc: {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish |ParentCountry=Bar | ParentNationality=Barish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:Marshallese people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country =Marshall Islands |Nationality=Marshallese |ParentCountry=United States |ParentNationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Scottish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Scotland |Nationality=Scottish |ParentCountry=United Kingdom | ParentNationality=British}} === See also === *[[Template:Nationality by occupation 2]] for category names using "People from" format *[[Template:Occupation by nationality]] *[[Template:Fooian people]] *[[Template:Fooian women]] / [[Template:Fooian men]] *[[Template:Fooian women by occupation]] / [[Template:Fooian men by occupation]] *[[Template:Fooian fooers]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian scientist types|Template:Fooian scientist types]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian biologist types|Template:Fooian biologist types]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia classification templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === ==== Sovereign nationalities ==== {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:American people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=United States |Nationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Irish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Ireland |Nationality=Irish }} ==== Non-sovereign nationalities ==== For colonies, protectorates, constituent countries, overseas territories etc: {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish |ParentCountry=Bar | ParentNationality=Barish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:Marshallese people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country =Marshall Islands |Nationality=Marshallese |ParentCountry=United States |ParentNationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Scottish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Scotland |Nationality=Scottish |ParentCountry=United Kingdom | ParentNationality=British}} === See also === *[[Template:Nationality by occupation 2]] for category names using "People from" format *[[Template:Occupation by nationality]] *[[Template:Fooian people]] *[[Template:Fooian women]] / [[Template:Fooian men]] *[[Template:Fooian women by occupation]] / [[Template:Fooian men by occupation]] *[[Template:Fooian fooers]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian scientist types|Template:Fooian scientist types]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian biologist types|Template:Fooian biologist types]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia classification templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === ==== Sovereign nationalities ==== {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:American people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=United States |Nationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Irish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Ireland |Nationality=Irish }} ==== Non-sovereign nationalities ==== For colonies, protectorates, constituent countries, overseas territories etc: {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish |ParentCountry=Bar | ParentNationality=Barish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:Marshallese people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country =Marshall Islands |Nationality=Marshallese |ParentCountry=United States |ParentNationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Scottish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Scotland |Nationality=Scottish |ParentCountry=United Kingdom | ParentNationality=British}} === See also === *[[Template:Nationality by occupation 2]] for category names using "People from" format *[[Template:Occupation by nationality]] *[[Template:Fooian people]] *[[Template:Fooian women]] / [[Template:Fooian men]] *[[Template:Fooian women by occupation]] / [[Template:Fooian men by occupation]] *[[Template:Fooian fooers]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian scientist types|Template:Fooian scientist types]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian biologist types|Template:Fooian biologist types]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wikipedia classification templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === ==== Sovereign nationalities ==== {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:American people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=United States |Nationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Irish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Ireland |Nationality=Irish }} ==== Non-sovereign nationalities ==== For colonies, protectorates, constituent countries, overseas territories etc: {{Nationality by occupation|Country=Foo |Nationality=Fooish |ParentCountry=Bar | ParentNationality=Barish}} Examples: * On [[:Category:Marshallese people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country =Marshall Islands |Nationality=Marshallese |ParentCountry=United States |ParentNationality=American }} * On [[:Category:Scottish people by occupation]] *: {{Nationality by occupation |Country=Scotland |Nationality=Scottish |ParentCountry=United Kingdom | ParentNationality=British}} === See also === *[[Template:Nationality by occupation 2]] for category names using "People from" format *[[Template:Occupation by nationality]] *[[Template:Fooian people]] *[[Template:Fooian women]] / [[Template:Fooian men]] *[[Template:Fooian women by occupation]] / [[Template:Fooian men by occupation]] *[[Template:Fooian fooers]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian scientist types|Template:Fooian scientist types]] *[[:en:Template:Fooian biologist types|Template:Fooian biologist types]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wikipedia classification templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
